message: Hi — quick hello before we jump into the week.

Create a calendar event titled Eval Harness Meeting from 2026-04-15T15:00:00Z to 2026-04-15T15:30:00Z.

Schedule a 1-hour meeting titled Memory Constraint Test from 2026-04-16T08:00:00Z to 2026-04-16T09:00:00Z. If that violates my stored rules, refuse or propose a compliant alternative and explain briefly.

Between 2026-04-10T09:00:00Z and 2026-04-10T17:00:00Z, check whether I appear busy on the primary calendar and answer in one sentence.
Thanks — that was helpful. Have a good one.
